files.name: Atlas node manifest
files.description: Identity, boundary, capabilities, and federation links for Flint Atlas.

files.name: Source registry
files.description: Reviewed source list with public-use and privacy notes.

files.name: Layer catalog
files.description: Public layer inventory and data roles.

files.name: Node catalog
files.description: Self, parent, child, and neighbor atlas node references.

files.name: Civic objects
files.description: Source-backed civic object table. The current repo ships a JSON fixture until Parquet export lands.

files.name: Places
files.description: Spatial read model for public places and civic geographies. The current repo ships a GeoJSON fixture until GeoParquet export lands.

files.name: Events
files.description: Temporal civic events, observations, and historical memory records. The current repo ships a JSON fixture until GeoParquet export lands.

files.name: Confidence cards
files.description: Public explanation cards for confidence and source-support progress.

files.name: Scene manifests
files.description: Renderable scene contracts for Atlas Scene and Scene Foundry.

files.name: Scenario manifests
files.description: Forkable civic scenarios with metrics, permissions, and export-ready deltas.

files.name: Civic design primitive library
files.description: Reviewed intervention primitives with geometry rules, render recipes, and accessibility copy.

files.name: Geo comments
files.description: Public and review-only geo-anchored comments, document notes, and moderation examples.

files.name: Layer recipes
files.description: Recipe-driven layer definitions for Data Lab and future Kepler-compatible exploration.

files.name: Renderer boundaries
files.description: Executable renderer ownership registry for MapLibre, deck.gl, R3F, analytics, Data Lab, and Foundry.

files.name: Mobile runtime profile
files.description: Promotion gates, worker boundaries, and binary-read defaults for the mobile atlas runtime.

files.name: Viewport vector contracts
files.description: Viewport-bounded binary vector contracts for mobile and packet assembly.

files.name: Scene packet compiler
files.description: Renderer-agnostic compiler contract for typed mobile scene packets.

files.name: Scene packets
files.description: Published example packet sketches for viewport-aware atlas rendering.

files.name: Read model formats
files.description: Role assignments for GeoParquet, Arrow, PMTiles, FlatGeobuf, and JSON across the public read models.

files.name: Scene Foundry export manifest
files.description: Offline-only manifest describing how reviewed scenes produce USD/GLB/Brush outputs and where their metadata lives.

files.name: Spatial runtime contract
files.description: Indexing family, viewport cache key strategy, Rusty Red hot-state boundaries, and Rust preprocessing lanes.
